reference: In one small spot on my tongue, there are small bumps that are very sensitive, and they have been there for about a week. I also just noticed today a small dark spot right by the tip of my tongue, about the size of a pea. I do not know what to make of all this.
text: In one small spot on my palm, there are small bumps that are very sensitive. I've been there for about a week. I also have today a small dark spot right by the tip of my thumb, about the size of a pea. I do not know what to make of all this.
